backstory.original: As a poor urchin on the streets of Calimport, Regis quickly learned that survival often requires bending the rules in your favor. He fled to the north to avoid capture after stealing his former master's magical ruby pendant. Eventually, he found companionship amongst the Companions of the Hall, becoming one of Bruenor Battlehammer's most trusted confidants. Bruenor was the one who gifted Regis with the nickname 'Rumblebelly' due to the halfling's insatiable appetite. Regis would prefer nothing more than to relax in the sun with a full belly near his home in Ten-Towns and fish for knucklehead trout, the source of all of his scrimshaw carvings. But when his friends need help, Regis is always there for them. He never sees himself as the hero, even though his true friends know better.
backstory.display: 作为卡林港街头的可怜流浪儿，瑞吉斯很快就明白，要想生存，往往需要让规则变得对自己有利。在偷了前主人的魔法红宝石吊坠后，他逃到了北方躲避追捕。最终，他在秘银五侠中找到了伙伴，成为布鲁诺·战锤最信任的知己之一。由于半身人贪得无厌的胃口，布鲁诺给瑞吉斯起了个绰号“馋鬼”。瑞吉斯最喜欢的事，莫过于在他位于十镇的家附近晒晒太阳，吃饱喝足和钓起那些蠢笨的鳟鱼，这也是他所有骨雕的来源。但当他的朋友需要帮助时，瑞吉斯总是会伸出援手。他从不认为自己是英雄，但他真正的朋友更清楚他确实是英雄。

description.original: Regis reluctantly stabs the nearest enemy with his dagger.
description.display: 瑞吉斯无奈地用匕首刺击距离最近的敌人。

description.original: Regis attacks using the power of his ruby pendant.
description.display: 瑞吉斯用他红宝石坠饰的力量发动攻击。

longDescription.original: Regis holds his ruby pendant up, damaging all enemies and stunning them for 5 seconds. Additionally, the effect of Ruby Encouragement is increased by 200% for 15 seconds.
longDescription.display: 瑞吉斯举起他的红宝石坠饰，对所有敌人造成伤害，并使其眩晕 5 秒。此外，“红宝石鼓舞”的效果提高 200%，持续 15 秒。

upgrades.effectReference: effect_def,1532

description.desc: Regis' base chance to Critical Hit is $amount%.
瑞吉斯的基础暴击几率为 $amount%。

upgrades.effectReference: hero_dps_multiplier_mult,300
effect_def,75

description.desc: Increases the damage of Champions in the column in front of $source by $(amount)%
处于$source前列的勇士提升 $(amount)% 伤害

specializationDescription.original: Regis will increase the damage of Champions in the column directly in front of him.
specializationDescription.display: 瑞吉斯使其正前方纵队中的勇士伤害提高。

tipText.original: Regis increases the damage of Champions in the column in front of him. Place him directly behind your best damage dealers!
tipText.display: 瑞吉斯使其正前方纵队中的勇士伤害提高。将他放置在最厉害的伤害输出者正后方！

upgrades.effectReference: effect_def,76

description.desc: Increases the damage of Champions in the column behind $source by $(amount)%
处于$source后列的勇士提升 $(amount)% 伤害

specializationDescription.original: Regis will increase the damage of Champions in the column directly behind him.
specializationDescription.display: 瑞吉斯使其正后方纵队中的勇士伤害提高。

tipText.original: Regis increases the damage of Champions in the column right behind him. Place him directly in front of your best damage dealers!
tipText.display: 瑞吉斯使其正后方纵队中的勇士伤害提高。将他放置在最厉害的伤害输出者正前方！

effect_def,1533

description.desc: Your formation gains $(amount___2) Mithral Hall stack. Regis increases your gold find bonus by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Mithral Hall stack you have, stacking multiplicatively.
你的阵型获得 $(amount___2) 层秘银厅堆叠。每层秘银厅堆叠均使瑞吉斯提高金币寻获量 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

effect_keys.stack_title: 瑞吉斯秘银厅堆叠层数

effect_def,1535

description.desc: When Regis scores a Critical Hit, his Ruby Pendant pulses and heals all Champions in the formation for $(not_buffed amount) for each Mithral Hall stack the formation has.
当瑞吉斯造成暴击时，他的红宝石坠饰力量涌动，每层秘银厅堆叠均为阵型中的所有勇士治疗 $(not_buffed amount) 点生命值。

upgrades.effectReference: hero_dps_multiplier_mult,300
effect_def,77

description.desc: Increases the damage taken by enemies when damaged by ranged attacks by $(amount)%.
受到的敌方远程攻击伤害提升 $(amount)%

specializationDescription.original: Regis increases the damage taken by monsters from ranged attacks.
specializationDescription.display: 瑞吉斯使怪物受到的远程攻击伤害提高。

tipText.original: Regis increases the damage taken by monsters from ranged attacks. Make sure your best damage dealers attack with ranged damage!
tipText.display: 瑞吉斯使怪物受到的远程攻击伤害提高。确保最厉害的伤害输出者发动远程攻击！

upgrades.effectReference: effect_def,78

description.desc: Increases the damage taken by enemies when damaged by melee attacks by $(amount)%.
受到的敌方近战攻击伤害提升 $(amount)%

specializationDescription.original: Regis increases the damage taken by monsters from melee attacks.
specializationDescription.display: 瑞吉斯使怪物受到的近战攻击伤害提高。

tipText.original: Regis increases the damage taken by monsters from melee attacks. Make sure your best damage dealers attack with melee damage!
tipText.display: 瑞吉斯使怪物受到的近战攻击伤害提高。确保最厉害的伤害输出者发动近战攻击！

upgrades.effectReference: effect_def,79

description.desc: Increases the damage taken by enemies when damaged by magic attacks by $(amount)%.
受到的敌方魔法攻击伤害提升 $(amount)%

specializationDescription.original: Regis increases the damage taken by monsters from magic attacks.
specializationDescription.display: 瑞吉斯使怪物受到的魔法攻击伤害提高。

tipText.original: Regis increases the damage taken by monsters from magic attacks. Make sure your best damage dealers attack with magic damage!
tipText.display: 瑞吉斯使怪物受到的魔法攻击伤害提高。确保最厉害的伤害输出者发动魔法攻击！

upgrades.effectReference: hero_dps_multiplier_mult,200
effect_def,1536

description.desc: Increases the effect of Ruby Encouragement by $(not_buffed amount)% when Regis scores a Critical Hit. This effect can stack up to $max_stacks times (multiplicatively). Stacks reset when changing areas.
瑞吉斯造成暴击时，“红宝石鼓舞”的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%。此效果最多堆叠 $max_stacks 层（乘算）。改变区域时重置堆叠。

description.desc: Whenever a Champion in the formation is critically hit by an enemy, Regis stores up one charge of Ruby Invigoration. While he has at least one charge, his chance to Critical Hit is increased by $(amount___2)%, and whenever he scores a Critical Hit a charge is consumed. He can store up to $max_charges charges.
每当阵型中的每位勇士受到敌人暴击时，瑞吉斯储存一层“红宝石唤醒”。拥有至少一层充能时，他的暴击几率提高 $(amount___2)%。每当他造成暴击时，消耗一层充能。他最多可以存储 $max_charges 层充能。

description.original: We should all benefit, shouldn't we?
description.display: 我们都应该从中受益，对吗？

description.original: Is it time for lunch yet? One more wave, then we get lunch!
description.display: 到了午餐的时间吗？再来一波，然后我们就吃午饭！

description.original: Win or lose -- we still made a difference!
description.display: 无论输赢，我们终归留下了痕迹！

description.original: We've got this!
description.display: 我们能行的！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Regis' Ruby Encouragement ability by $(amount)%.

description.original: Feel the strong glow of my ruby pendant.
description.display: 感受我红宝石吊坠的强烈光辉吧。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Regis' Ruby Encouragement ability by $(amount)%.

description.original: My ruby pendant shall blind our enemies.
description.display: 我的红宝石吊坠将致盲我们的敌人。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Regis' Ruby Encouragement ability by $(amount)%.

description.original: Trust me on this.
description.display: 相信我。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Regis' Ruby Weakness ability by $(amount)%.

description.original: Red snow - and not from blood this time!
description.display: 红色的血--这次不是因为鲜血！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Regis' Ruby Weakness ability by $(amount)%.

description.original: I'll make sure you enter combat in tip-top shape!
description.display: 我要确保你以最完美的状态进入战斗！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Regis' Ruby Healing ability by $amount%

description.original: A little more health never hurt anyone, right?
description.display: 多一点生命值也不会伤害到别人，对吧？

effects.description: Increases the effect of Regis' Ruby Healing ability by $amount%

description.original: You could break down that door, or you could try to open it first. Your call.
description.display: 你可以尝试撞倒那道门，也可以先试试能不能打开。你自己选吧。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Regis' Ruby Healing ability by $amount%

description.original: I've learned a thing or two in my time...
description.display: 以前我也学过那么一两手......

description.original: Don't let my size fool you.
description.display: 别被我的体型给骗了。

description.original: This mace isn't just decoration!
description.display: 这把钉锤可不只是装饰品！

description.original: Relax -- there can't be a battle every day.
description.display: 放松点，不可能每天都要战斗。

effects.description: Additively increases Regis' Mithral Hall Stacks contribution by $amount

description.original: We stick with Bruenor's plan!
description.display: 我们要坚持布鲁诺的计划！

effects.description: Additively increases Regis' Mithral Hall Stacks contribution by $amount

description.original: Now I know your weak spot!
description.display: 这下我知道你的弱点了！

description.original: I could teach you a thing or two about underestimating common folk.
description.display: 我可以给你上一课，教会你别小瞧普通人。

effects._description: FEAT_2358_EFFECTS_0_DESC|Increases the damage of all Champions by 20% for each unique species in the formation, stacking additively.

character_sheet_details.backstory: As a poor urchin on the streets of Calimport, Regis quickly learned that survival often requires bending the rules in your favor. He fled to the north to avoid capture after stealing his former master's magical ruby pendant. Eventually, he found companionship amongst the Companions of the Hall, becoming one of Bruenor Battlehammer's most trusted confidants. Bruenor was the one who gifted Regis with the nickname 'Rumblebelly' due to the halfling's insatiable appetite. Regis would prefer nothing more than to relax in the sun with a full belly near his home in Ten-Towns and fish for knucklehead trout, the source of all of his scrimshaw carvings. But when his friends need help, Regis is always there for them. He never sees himself as the hero, even though his true friends know better.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Regis is a flexible buffer who can be customized via his specializations to make him fit into almost any formation.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 作为卡林港街头的可怜流浪儿，瑞吉斯很快就明白，要想生存，往往需要让规则变得对自己有利。在偷了前主人的魔法红宝石吊坠后，他逃到了北方躲避追捕。最终，他在秘银五侠中找到了伙伴，成为布鲁诺·战锤最信任的知己之一。由于半身人贪得无厌的胃口，布鲁诺给瑞吉斯起了个绰号“馋鬼”。瑞吉斯最喜欢的事，莫过于在他位于十镇的家附近晒晒太阳，吃饱喝足和钓起那些蠢笨的鳟鱼，这也是他所有骨雕的来源。但当他的朋友需要帮助时，瑞吉斯总是会伸出援手。他从不认为自己是英雄，但他真正的朋友更清楚他确实是英雄。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 瑞吉斯是一位灵活的增益提供者。他可以通过选择专精适用于几乎任何阵型。

display.name: 红宝石鼓舞
display.specialization_description: 瑞吉斯使其正前方纵队中的勇士伤害提高。
display.tip_text: 瑞吉斯使其正前方纵队中的勇士伤害提高。将他放置在最厉害的伤害输出者正后方！

original.effect: effect_def,76
original.name: Ruby Encouragement
original.specialization_description: Regis will increase the damage of Champions in the column directly behind him.
original.tip_text: Regis increases the damage of Champions in the column right behind him. Place him directly in front of your best damage dealers!

display.name: 红宝石鼓舞
display.specialization_description: 瑞吉斯使其正后方纵队中的勇士伤害提高。
display.tip_text: 瑞吉斯使其正后方纵队中的勇士伤害提高。将他放置在最厉害的伤害输出者正前方！

original.effect: effect_def,77
original.name: Ruby Weakness
original.specialization_description: Regis increases the damage taken by monsters from ranged attacks.
original.tip_text: Regis increases the damage taken by monsters from ranged attacks. Make sure your best damage dealers attack with ranged damage!

display.name: 红宝石弱点
display.specialization_description: 瑞吉斯使怪物受到的远程攻击伤害提高。
display.tip_text: 瑞吉斯使怪物受到的远程攻击伤害提高。确保最厉害的伤害输出者发动远程攻击！

original.effect: effect_def,78
original.name: Ruby Weakness
original.specialization_description: Regis increases the damage taken by monsters from melee attacks.
original.tip_text: Regis increases the damage taken by monsters from melee attacks. Make sure your best damage dealers attack with melee damage!

display.name: 红宝石弱点
display.specialization_description: 瑞吉斯使怪物受到的近战攻击伤害提高。
display.tip_text: 瑞吉斯使怪物受到的近战攻击伤害提高。确保最厉害的伤害输出者发动近战攻击！

original.effect: effect_def,79
original.name: Ruby Weakness
original.specialization_description: Regis increases the damage taken by monsters from magic attacks.
original.tip_text: Regis increases the damage taken by monsters from magic attacks. Make sure your best damage dealers attack with magic damage!

display.name: 红宝石弱点
display.specialization_description: 瑞吉斯使怪物受到的魔法攻击伤害提高。
display.tip_text: 瑞吉斯使怪物受到的魔法攻击伤害提高。确保最厉害的伤害输出者发动魔法攻击！

original.name: Selflessness
original.description: We should all benefit, shouldn't we?

display.name: 无私
display.description: 我们都应该从中受益，对吗？

original.name: Inspiring Leader
original.description: Is it time for lunch yet? One more wave, then we get lunch!

display.name: 鼓舞人心的首领
display.description: 到了午餐的时间吗？再来一波，然后我们就吃午饭！

original.name: Medic
original.description: I'll make sure you enter combat in tip-top shape!

effects.description: Increases the effect of Regis' Ruby Healing ability by $amount%

display.name: 医师
display.description: 我要确保你以最完美的状态进入战斗！

effects.description: 使瑞吉斯的“红宝石治疗”技能的效果提高 $amount%

original.name: Combat Healer
original.description: A little more health never hurt anyone, right?

effects.description: Increases the effect of Regis' Ruby Healing ability by $amount%

display.name: 战斗治疗师
display.description: 多一点生命值也不会伤害到别人，对吧？

effects.description: 使瑞吉斯的“红宝石治疗”技能的效果提高 $amount%

original.name: Ritual Caster
original.description: Feel the strong glow of my ruby pendant.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Regis' Ruby Encouragement ability by $(amount)%.

display.name: 仪式咒术师
display.description: 感受我红宝石吊坠的强烈光辉吧。

effects.description: 使瑞吉斯的“红宝石鼓舞”技能的效果提高 $(amount)%。

original.name: Ruby Blindness
original.description: My ruby pendant shall blind our enemies.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Regis' Ruby Encouragement ability by $(amount)%.

display.name: 红宝石致盲
display.description: 我的红宝石吊坠将致盲我们的敌人。

effects.description: 使瑞吉斯的“红宝石鼓舞”技能效果提高 $(amount)%。

original.name: Ruby Reflection
original.description: Red snow - and not from blood this time!

effects.description: Increases the effect of Regis' Ruby Weakness ability by $(amount)%.

display.name: 红宝石反射
display.description: 红色的血--这次不是因为鲜血！

effects.description: 使瑞吉斯的“红宝石弱点”技能的效果提高 $(amount)%。

original.name: Wound Master
original.description: You could break down that door, or you could try to open it first. Your call.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Regis' Ruby Healing ability by $amount%

display.name: 受伤大师
display.description: 你可以尝试撞倒那道门，也可以先试试能不能打开。你自己选吧。

effects.description: 使瑞吉斯的“红宝石治疗”技能效果提高 $amount%

original.name: Heavy Lifter
original.description: I've learned a thing or two in my time...

display.name: 惯偷
display.description: 以前我也学过那么一两手......

original.name: Rest Awhile
original.description: Relax -- there can't be a battle every day.

effects.description: Additively increases Regis' Mithral Hall Stacks contribution by $amount

display.name: 短暂休息
display.description: 放松点，不可能每天都要战斗。

effects.description: 瑞吉斯的秘银厅堆叠层数贡献提高 $amount 层（加算）

original.name: Advisor of the Hall
original.description: We stick with Bruenor's plan!

effects.description: Additively increases Regis' Mithral Hall Stacks contribution by $amount

display.name: 秘银厅顾问
display.description: 我们要坚持布鲁诺的计划！

effects.description: 瑞吉斯的秘银厅堆叠层数贡献提高 $amount 层（加算）

original.name: Prodigal Leader
original.description: Win or lose -- we still made a difference!

display.name: 浪荡首领
display.description: 无论输赢，我们终归留下了痕迹！

original.name: Ruby Sparkle
original.description: We've got this!

effects.description: Increases the effect of Regis' Ruby Encouragement ability by $(amount)%.

display.name: 红宝石闪耀
display.description: 我们能行的！

effects.description: 使瑞吉斯的“红宝石鼓舞”技能的效果提高 $(amount)%。

original.name: Battle Expertise
original.description: Don't let my size fool you.

display.name: 战斗专长
display.description: 别被我的体型给骗了。

original.name: Master's Precision
original.description: This mace isn't just decoration!

display.name: 大师精度
display.description: 这把钉锤可不只是装饰品！

original.name: Bad Influence
original.description: Trust me on this.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Regis' Ruby Weakness ability by $(amount)%.

display.name: 不良影响
display.description: 相信我。

effects.description: 使瑞吉斯的“红宝石弱点”技能的效果提高 $(amount)%。

original.name: Master's Precision
original.description: Now I know your weak spot!

display.name: 大师精度
display.description: 这下我知道你的弱点了！

original.name: Standard Affair
original.description: I could teach you a thing or two about underestimating common folk.

effects._description: FEAT_2358_EFFECTS_0_DESC|Increases the damage of all Champions by 20% for each unique species in the formation, stacking additively.

display.name: 常规事项
display.description: 我可以给你上一课，教会你别小瞧普通人。
